HGSS.478.0000:
Lt. Surge: Hey, you little tyke!\f
It may not be very smart to
challenge me, but it takes guts!\f
When it comes to Electric-type Pokémon,
I’m number one!\f
I’ve never lost on the battlefield.\f
I’ll zap you just like I do all my
enemies in battle!\f
HGSS.478.0001:
Lt. Surge: Arrrgh!
You are strong!\f
OK, kid.
You get the Thunder Badge!\f
HGSS.478.0002:
[0103,0000,0000] received
the Thunder Badge from Lt. Surge!
HGSS.478.0003:
Lt. Surge: That Thunder Badge suits
those who’ve defeated me!\r
Take good care of it, OK?\f
There is something else.
Here is a great TM for you!\f
HGSS.478.0004:
Lt. Surge: That TM contains
Shock Wave... Zzzap!\f
Use it to go like lightning!\f
When you go north, you will see
a big city called Saffron!
HGSS.478.0005:
Lt. Surge: Hey, kid!
Still slugging and chugging away?\f
When you go north, you will see a
big city called Saffron!
HGSS.478.0006:
Yo! Legend in the making!
You lucked out this time.\f
The traps at this Gym have been out
of order for a while.\f
But the traps are back up and
running now!\r
Why lucky, you may ask...\f
Because you can train yourself better
that way!\f
Make up your mind and go for Lt. Surge!
HGSS.478.0007:
Whew! That was an electrifying bout!
It sure made my nerves tingle.
HGSS.478.0009:
...
Oh, you found a secret switch at the\r
bottom of the trash can!\r
Better press it.
HGSS.478.0010:
Nope! Nothing here but trash.
Oh no, the electric fence is\r
locked again!
HGSS.478.0011: The first electric fence is unlocked!
HGSS.478.0012:
The second electric fence is unlocked!\f
Now the electric fences are gone, and
the path to the Leader is clear!
HGSS.478.0014:
Vermilion City Pokémon Gym\f
Gym Leader: Lt. Surge
Certified Trainer!\r
[0103,0000,0000]
